summary: A decent matrix recording with good sound quality captures a weird‑wonderful, timeless set highlighted by King Solomon’s Marbles.
review: Listeners rave about the magical vibe of this unknown‑date show, calling the set “weird and wonderful” and noting that it stands the test of time. The recording, likely a Hunter matrix mix, is praised for its sound quality compared with other versions, though a few note minor technical imperfections.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on the performance (70% weight) and generally good but not flawless recording quality (30% weight) lead to an overall high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound quality is appreciated versus other versions; a few reviewers note it isn’t technically perfect. One reviewer wonders if it’s audience‑only, suggesting some ambiguity about the source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as magical, weird and wonderful, with a timeless feel that keeps listeners engaged throughout.
